page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A Sequence-Based Tool for the Prediction and Analysis of Quorum Sensing Peptides via Chou's 5-Steps Rule and Informative Physicochemical Properties.

A sequence-based tool for the prediction and analysis of quorum sensing peptides using informative physicochemical properties.
